strongest_lane: onboarding smoke + app UI tests + app tests
primary_claim: step progression, completion routing, deterministic first-run flow coverage
remaining_gap: no production-backed first-run path with actual packaged runtime/model resolution

strongest_lane: permission remediation smoke + app UI tests
primary_claim: permission failure copy, remediation buttons, deterministic recovery flow
remaining_gap: no retained proof of real TCC denial/regrant behavior in app context

primary_claim: readiness ID/domain mapping, block vs warn semantics, fallback eligibility
simulation_or_bypass: JSON fixture envelopes; stub command runners
remaining_gap: no end-to-end proof that UI surfaces only Rust-authoritative readiness in real app runtime

strongest_lane: runtime readiness smoke + app tests + release-context verifier
primary_claim: override validation, bundled payload expectations, packaged payload presence/signing checks
remaining_gap: no lane proves packaged app launch, runtime resolution, and first live start together

strongest_lane: process lifecycle smokes + runtime stop/finalization smoke + UI automation smoke
primary_claim: state transitions, stop/finalization handling, interruption and retry logic
simulation_or_bypass: LiveRuntimeService; ScriptedRuntimeService; synthetic manifests; temp roots; mocked session/export services
remaining_gap: no production-backed app-shell to actual runtime process lane

strongest_lane: true live integration + observability tests + live_capture tests
primary_claim: artifact growth, stable transcript emission, scheduler and backpressure diagnostics
remaining_gap: no live-real device/TCC capture lane through the product app path

primary_claim: status mapping, retry/delete retention policy, exit-behavior contract
simulation_or_bypass: synthetic audio fixtures; direct binary invocation
remaining_gap: not connected to packaged-app UX recovery with shared evidence

primary_claim: promotion/failure handling, repair and migration logic, sidecar update behavior
simulation_or_bypass: mock runtime services; synthetic session roots
remaining_gap: no production-backed retained-session lane from actual runs

primary_claim: indexing, event mapping, list filtering, empty/error state behavior
remaining_gap: no packaged-app proof against real session corpus generated by product flows

strongest_lane: export smokes + UI automation export wiring
primary_claim: export naming, path restrictions, view-model behavior, action wiring
remaining_gap: no app-level or packaged lane validating export from real completed sessions

primary_claim: responsiveness metrics and retained xctest/xcresult evidence
remaining_gap: not yet proof of real runtime responsiveness in shipped path

strongest_lane: app UI tests + xctest evidence script
primary_claim: visible onboarding/live-run summary flow with retained xcresult/logs
simulation_or_bypass: RECORDIT_UI_TEST_MODE=1; /usr/bin/true runtime overrides; scripted preflight/runtime scenarios

primary_claim: CLI grammar stability, schema compatibility, frozen artifact parsing and drift detection
simulation_or_bypass: frozen JSON and JSONL fixtures; direct help/inspect command execution
remaining_gap: strong compatibility proof but not user-journey proof

strongest_lane: release-context verifier + packaged live smoke + dmg install/open verifier

simulation_or_bypass: deterministic fake capture; compatibility runtime assistance
remaining_gap: onboarding plus first live-start/live-stop is still not covered in the installed-DMG lane

primary_claim: commands and evidence roots for sign/notarize/staple/Gatekeeper workflow are defined
simulation_or_bypass: procedural/documented until executed and archived for a concrete release candidate

strongest_lane: DMG install/open verifier + DMG builder + README instructions
primary_claim: retained automated mount/layout/copy/open verification with contract-validated diagnostics
simulation_or_bypass: lane currently stops at install/open and does not include onboarding or first live stop
